records.ety: [F., fr.L. omnipotens, -entis; omnis all + potens powerful, potent. See Potent.]

defs: Able in every respect and for every work; unlimited in ability; all-powerful; almighty; as, the Being that can create worlds must be omnipotent.
quotes: God's will and pleasure and his omnipotent power.

defs: Having unlimited power of a particular kind; as, omnipotent love.
